description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

You inhale deeply before breathing out a cloud of thick ashes and embers which grants 20% concealment and spreads to 20 ft. width next round. Each round a creature is inside the cloud (standing in it, moving through it, etc.), it must save to avoid being @Condition[blind]{blinded} for 1d4 rounds and must make a Constitution check (DC 10, +1 per consecutive check) to avoid spending the round coughing uncontrollably, unable to take any actions. Each consecutive round spent coughing after the first inflicts 1d6 damage. A gas mask or similar device grants a +2 bonus to the check.

In addition, the cloud deals 2d6 fire damage to creatures inside it the first round it exists, reduced to 1d6 the second round and no damage the third round. After three rounds, the cloud disperses. A moderate wind (11+ mph) causes the smoke to disperse in 2 rounds, while a strong wind (21+ mph) causes it to disperse in 1 round.
